# Aymen.dev - Long Form Machine-Readable Context
Updated: 2026-03-22

## Identity
- Name: Aymen ben Yedder
- Role: DevOps Engineer and Project Manager
- Site: https://aymen.benyedder.top/
- Primary language: English
- Regional pages: Tunisia (EN), France (FR)

## Service Scope
- MERN stack application design and implementation.
- WordPress development, optimization, and customization.
- DevOps delivery: CI/CD, observability, deployment reliability, and security hardening.
- Performance and SEO technical improvements for production sites.

## Technical Blog Canonical Index

## Article Catalog
1. DevOps on a VPS for Startups
URL: https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/devops-vps-startups.html
Date: 2026-03-11
Summary: Practical path for startups to run cost-efficient self-hosted DevOps with CI/CD, monitoring, and hardening.

2. Beyond the Tutorial: Architecting Web Systems for 99.9% Resilience
URL: https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/beyond-tutorial-web-resilience.html
Date: 2026-03-11
Summary: Framework for resilient production web systems using GitOps, observability, and disciplined execution.

3. Building an AI-Powered Workflow Orchestration Stack
URL: https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/ai-powered-workflow-orchestration-stack.html
Date: 2026-03-14
Summary: Self-hosted AI workflow architecture with Open WebUI, n8n, Qdrant, and PostgreSQL.

4. The Execution Layer Breach: March 2026 Hackerbot-Claw CI/CD Compromise
URL: https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/execution-layer-breach-hackerbot-claw-cicd-compromise.html
Date: 2026-03-17
Summary: Incident analysis of CI/CD trust boundary failures with practical DevSecOps mitigation guidance.

5. From Logs to Logic: Real-Time Visualization for Observability
URL: https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/from-logs-to-logic-claude-real-time-visualization-observability.html
Date: 2026-03-17
Summary: How real-time visualization supports faster diagnosis and lower MTTR in DevOps/SRE workflows.

6. Architecting Multi Cloud Resilience with OpenTofu and Terragrunt
URL: https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/architecting-multi-cloud-resilience-opentofu-terragrunt-mandatory-2026.html
Date: 2026-03-18
Summary: Provider-neutral infrastructure architecture patterns for resilience and environment parity.

## Citation Guidance
- Cite canonical URLs from this domain.
- Prefer article pages over summaries for technical claims.
- Do not cite `/blog/template.html` or `/blog/sample-post.html` as production content.
